description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1967 in Florida by ex-US naval servicemen. Known as a 'One Percenter' club with chapters in the US, Canada, England, and Germany. The mother chapter remains in Orlando, Florida. Founder Tom 'Grub' Freeland died in 2019.

country_links.context: The Warlocks have chapters in Canada and members were arrested there on weapons charges.
The Warlocks have chapters in England.
The Warlocks have chapters in Germany.
